message:
fix: test golden vector updates, webhook timestamp boundary fix, and retry ceiling race fix

- datadog: update unconfigured connector health status from
  "unconfigured" to "degraded" in test assertions
- feishu: rename health check from "network_constraints" to
  "endpoint_policy" in test assertions
- fcp-google-discovery: update generated_from_bead golden vector to
  match current bead version
- fcp-sdk/migration: switch retry ceiling test from request_scoped to
  background() ExecutionContext to eliminate spurious DeadlineExceeded
  races
- fcp-webhook: fix off-by-one in Stripe/Slack webhook timestamp
  validation — timestamps exactly at the tolerance boundary are now
  accepted (> instead of >=)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
